sections.paragraph:
fut. יִרְמֹס (cogn. to רָפַס)-

(1) to tread with the feet, as a potter does clay, followed by an acc., Isa 41:25 followed by בְּ Neh 3:14, to tread upon, walk over any thing, Psa 91:13.

(2) to tread down, 2Ki 7:17, 20 2Ki 7:20 Dan 8:7, 10 Isa 63:3 1:12 , רְמֹס חֲצֵרַי “to tread down my courts,” i.e. to profane them, compare Rev 11:2 1Ma_3:45 . Part. רֹמֵס a treader down, an oppressor, Isa 16:4.

Niphal, pass. of No. 2, Isa 28:3.

Derivative, מִרְמָס.
